food.title: Start logging
food.description: Type what you ate in the field below. Or just pick from the food list with the button.

events.title: No events yet
events.description: Note how you feel, symptoms, sleep — anything you noticed during the day. It later feeds into the analysis.

all.title: No analyses yet
all.description: An analysis looks at your food, events and chosen hypotheses — over a day or 1–5 weeks. Start your first one with the «New analysis» button.

daily.title: No daily analyses yet
daily.description: A daily analysis looks at a single date — its food and events. Start one with the «New analysis» button.

long.title: No long analyses yet
long.description: A long analysis looks at 1–5 weeks at once. Start one with the «New analysis» button.

loadFailed.title: Couldn't load
loadFailed.description: The analyses list didn't load — check your connection.

insights.info: Insights appear on a day or dish analysis — they're the connections and cautions about your food. Tap «Save» on an analysis and they'll show up here.

hypotheses.title: Hypotheses
hypotheses.info: A hypothesis is something you want to test over a couple of weeks. For example: «Headache after dairy». Write your first one in the field below.
hypotheses.pickerEmpty: No hypotheses yet — create them with the «Hypotheses» button.

longEmpty.title: No hypotheses yet
longEmpty.description: You can run an analysis without them.

clarification.placeholder: Anything to consider for the analysis? (optional)

unrecognized.title: Nothing recognised
unrecognized.description: Try describing it in more detail.

freeText.clarifyPlaceholder: Anything to clarify? For example: vegetarian, dairy-free

dish.notFound: Dish not found — it may have been deleted
dish.emptyIngredients: No ingredients in the dish yet

product.emptyComposition: The product has no composition yet
